name: tanstack-cn-monorepo
description: Monorepo for tanstack-cn: the starter template, create-tanstack-cn CLI, and tanstack-cn reserved npm package.

scripts.template:dev: cd templates/default && bun install && bun run dev
scripts.template:build: cd templates/default && bun install && bun run build
scripts.template:test: cd templates/default && bun install && bun run test
scripts.template:lint: cd templates/default && bun install && bun run lint
scripts.template:fmt:check: cd templates/default && bun install && bun run fmt:check
scripts.template:typecheck: cd templates/default && bun install && bun run typecheck

author: Ramon Claudio <rmncldyo@gmail.com> (https://github.com/ramonclaudio)
